ddls:
CREATE TABLE "database_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each database link */,
  "link_name" TEXT /* Name of the database link */,
  "description" TEXT /* Purpose of the database link */,
  "defined_in" TEXT /* File or location where the link is defined */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment where the link is used (development, testing, production) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the link (active, inactive, deprecated) */,
  "last_tested" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last time the link was tested for connectivity */,
  "connection_string" TEXT /* Full connection string for the database link */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tns_aliases" (
  "alias_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each TNS alias */,
  "alias_name" TEXT /* Name of the TNS alias */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the TNS alias */,
  "defined_in" TEXT /* File or location where the alias is defined */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment where the alias is used (development, testing, production) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the alias (active, inactive, deprecated) */,
  "last_tested" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last time the alias was tested for connectivity */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Service name associated with the TNS alias */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alias_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gateway_servers" (
  "server_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gateway server */,
  "server_name" TEXT /* Name of the gateway server */,
  "description" TEXT /* Purpose of the gateway server */,
  "hostname" TEXT /* Hostname where the gateway is installed */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment where the server is used (development, testing, production) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the server (active, inactive, maintenance) */,
  "last_tested" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last time the server was tested for connectivity */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the gateway software installed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("server_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gateway_sids" (
  "sid_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each SID */,
  "sid_name" TEXT /* Name of the Gateway SID */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the SID */,
  "defined_in" TEXT /* File or location where the SID is defined */,
  "case_sensitive" INTEGER /* Indicates if the SID is case sensitive */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment where the SID is used (development, testing, production) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the SID (active, inactive, deprecated) */,
  "last_tested" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last time the SID was tested for connectivity */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Service name associated with the SID */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sid_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "odbc_datasources" (
  "dsn_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ODBC data source */,
  "dsn_name" TEXT /* Name of the ODBC data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ODBC data source */,
  "defined_in" TEXT /* File or location where the data source is defined */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment where the data source is used (development, testing, production) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the data source (active, inactive, deprecated) */,
  "last_tested" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last time the data source was tested for connectivity */,
  "connection_string" TEXT /* Full connection string for the ODBC data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dsn_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "connection_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "link_id" INTEGER /* ID of the database link used */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the connection event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the connection */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., connect, disconnect) */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment where the connection was established (development, testing, production) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Result of the connection attempt (success, failure) */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message if the connection attempt failed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_connection_logs_link_id FOREIGN KEY ("link_id") REFERENCES database_links ("link_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, developer) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (active, inactive, locked) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "last_password_change" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last password change */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the user belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_controls" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access control entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who has access */,
  "link_id" INTEGER /* ID of the database link related to access */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Level of permission (e.g., read, write) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the access control entry (active, inactive) */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_controls_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_controls_link_id FOREIGN KEY ("link_id") REFERENCES database_links ("link_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configuration_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "link_id" INTEGER /* ID of the database link related to the change */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_details" TEXT /* Details of the change made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the configuration change (active, inactive) */,
  "reverted" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the change was reverted */,
  "revert_reason" TEXT /* Reason for reverting the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_history_link_id FOREIGN KEY ("link_id") REFERENCES database_links ("link_id")
)
